mapper.select: select * from sys_role where deleted = 0 order by id asc
select * from sys_role where deleted = 0 and role_code <> 'ADMIN' order by id asc
select * from sys_role where deleted = 0 order by id asc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(1) from sys_role where deleted = 0
select * from sys_role where deleted = 0 and role_code <> 'ADMIN' order by id asc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(1) from sys_role where deleted = 0 and role_code <> 'ADMIN'
select * from sys_role where role_code = #{roleCode} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from sys_role where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role(role_name, role_code, status, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted) values(#{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update sys_role set role_name = #{roleName}, role_code = #{roleCode}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
update sys_role set deleted = 1, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_role where role_code = #{roleCode} and deleted = 0 and (#{excludeId} is null or id <> #{excludeId})
